## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview for Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/EEGZV2qY7BNCPrg_NLERYQwe6CfT-gpy?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role evolving: Managing Editors now responsible for content generation & editing (3-5 clients, 5 pieces/client)](https://fathom.video/share/EEGZV2qY7BNCPrg_NLERYQwe6CfT-gpy?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Technical aspect: Communicate content quality needs to engineering, work w/ AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/EEGZV2qY7BNCPrg_NLERYQwe6CfT-gpy?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Key skills: Strong editorial chops, agility to pivot quickly, AI experience beneficial](https://fathom.video/share/EEGZV2qY7BNCPrg_NLERYQwe6CfT-gpy?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
  - [Work structure: Execution-focused (8am-12pm PT core hrs), client-facing tasks moving to other roles](https://fathom.video/share/EEGZV2qY7BNCPrg_NLERYQwe6CfT-gpy?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview & Responsibilities

  - [Managing Editor: Heart of content production, working w/ AI system & workflows](https://fathom.video/share/EEGZV2qY7BNCPrg_NLERYQwe6CfT-gpy?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Generate/edit 5 content pieces per client (managing 3-5 clients)](https://fathom.video/share/EEGZV2qY7BNCPrg_NLERYQwe6CfT-gpy?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Technical communication w/ engineering team on content quality improvements](https://fathom.video/share/EEGZV2qY7BNCPrg_NLERYQwe6CfT-gpy?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Keyword gap analysis, topic assignments, deliverable tracking in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/EEGZV2qY7BNCPrg_NLERYQwe6CfT-gpy?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [Executing against account strategist/director's ideas & client-approved topics](https://fathom.video/share/EEGZV2qY7BNCPrg_NLERYQwe6CfT-gpy?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)

### Team Structure

  - [11-12 pods, each w/ Account Director (client relationship/vision) & Account Strategist (SEO, content audits, analytics)](https://fathom.video/share/EEGZV2qY7BNCPrg_NLERYQwe6CfT-gpy?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
  - [5 directors currently, role shifting away from client-facing work](https://fathom.video/share/EEGZV2qY7BNCPrg_NLERYQwe6CfT-gpy?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
  - [Separate publisher role for content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/EEGZV2qY7BNCPrg_NLERYQwe6CfT-gpy?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)

### AI & Content Engineering

  - [Caitlin's experience: AirOps cohort, editing AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/EEGZV2qY7BNCPrg_NLERYQwe6CfT-gpy?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Focus on plagiarism prevention, fact-checking, maintaining brand voice](https://fathom.video/share/EEGZV2qY7BNCPrg_NLERYQwe6CfT-gpy?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Prompt engineering to vary sentence structure, maintain themes throughout content](https://fathom.video/share/EEGZV2qY7BNCPrg_NLERYQwe6CfT-gpy?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)

### Project Management & Prioritization

  - [Caitlin uses Asana, time estimates, Eisenhower Matrix for prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/EEGZV2qY7BNCPrg_NLERYQwe6CfT-gpy?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [GrowthX uses Airtable for deliverable tracking](https://fathom.video/share/EEGZV2qY7BNCPrg_NLERYQwe6CfT-gpy?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [Emphasis on realistic deadlines, clear communication](https://fathom.video/share/EEGZV2qY7BNCPrg_NLERYQwe6CfT-gpy?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)

### Work Environment & Expectations

  - [Startup, scrappy environment requiring agility & quick pivots](https://fathom.video/share/EEGZV2qY7BNCPrg_NLERYQwe6CfT-gpy?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
  - [8-hour workday, core hours 8am-12pm PT for execution](https://fathom.video/share/EEGZV2qY7BNCPrg_NLERYQwe6CfT-gpy?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
  - [Building trust for direct client feedback on work](https://fathom.video/share/EEGZV2qY7BNCPrg_NLERYQwe6CfT-gpy?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Assess Caitlin's fit for evolving Managing Editor role](https://fathom.video/share/EEGZV2qY7BNCPrg_NLERYQwe6CfT-gpy?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
